gamerule.idletick_armor_stands.skip_inte: Ticks between full armor stand ticks (2–100)
idletick_armor_stands.config.dont_skip_i: Never skip ticks for armor stands carrying passengers.
Never skip ticks for armor stands flagged for knockback/damage sync.
Never skip ticks for armor stands currently in motion.
Never skip ticks for burning armor stands.
Never skip ticks for armor stands riding another entity.
idletick_armor_stands.config.enabled.too: Master switch — disables all optimisations when off.
idletick_armor_stands.config.skip_interv: Full-tick every Nth tick (2–100). Lower = more responsive, higher = more savings.
idletick_armor_stands.config.skip_when_n: Allow skipping ticks for armor stands with NoGravity set.
idletick_armor_stands.config.skip_when_o: Allow skipping ticks for armor stands resting on the ground.
idletick_armor_stands.config.title: IdleTick - Armor Stands Configuration
